title: Beehiiv vs ActiveCampaign (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Compare Beehiiv and ActiveCampaign: pricing, features, automation, and CRM capabilities to find the best email marketing tool for your needs.
intro: Beehiiv and ActiveCampaign serve different segments of the email marketing landscape. Beehiiv is purpose-built for newsletter creators and publishers seeking monetization options, while ActiveCampaign targets businesses needing comprehensive automation and CRM integration. Your choice depends on whether you prioritize newsletter growth or advanced customer relationship management.

comparison_table.tool_a: Newsletter monetization, ad network, referral program
comparison_table.tool_b: Advanced automation, lead scoring, CRM, SMS

choose_a_if: You're building a newsletter and want to monetize through ads and sponsorships
You need a free tier to get started with up to 2,500 subscribers
You want built-in referral programs and a web reader for your audience
choose_b_if: You need advanced automation workflows and lead scoring capabilities
You require integrated CRM functionality for full customer lifecycle management
You want SMS marketing, site tracking, and dynamic content personalization

faq.a: Neither is objectively better—they serve different needs. Beehiiv excels for newsletter creators seeking monetization and audience growth tools, while ActiveCampaign is superior for businesses requiring sophisticated automation and CRM features. Your choice should align with your primary use case.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, Beehiiv or ActiveCampaign?
faq.a: Beehiiv offers a free tier supporting up to 2,500 subscribers, making it cheaper for startups. ActiveCampaign has no free option but starts at $15/month. At scale, pricing depends on subscriber count and feature requirements for both platforms.

faq.q: Can I switch from ActiveCampaign to Beehiiv?
faq.a: Yes, both platforms support standard email list imports. However, you'll lose ActiveCampaign-specific features like CRM data and automation workflows during migration. Plan your transition carefully and export your contacts in CSV format for seamless transfer.
